creator: joneum@FreeBSD.org
text:
when I use http://vuxml.freebsd.org/ and i click on the first link vuxml-11.dtd -> http://vuxml.freebsd.org/dtd/vuxml-1/vuxml-11.dtd is this error: XML Parsing 

Error: syntax error
Location: http://vuxml.freebsd.org/dtd/vuxml-1/vuxml-11.dtd
Line Number 37, Column 1:<!ENTITY % xhtml-datatypes.mod
^
